Class RedactionResult

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
public final class RedactionResult extends Object
Immutable result object returned by SemanticPrivacyGuard.redact().

Contains the sanitised text, the full list of detections, a reverse-lookup map from replacement token back to the original value (for authorised de-tokenisation), and summary statistics.

RedactionResult result = spg.redact(rawText);

String safe = result.getRedactedText();          // text safe to send to LLM
int    n    = result.getMatchCount();            // number of PII items found
String orig = result.getReverseMap()
                    .get("[EMAIL_1]");            // "alice@example.com"
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

    RedactionResult(String originalText, String redactedText, List<PIIMatch> matches, Map<String,String> reverseMap, long processingTimeMs)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    containsPII()
    Returns true if at least one PII item was detected.
    int
    getMatchCount()
    Returns the number of PII items detected.
    List<PIIMatch>
    getMatches()
    Returns an unmodifiable list of all PII matches, sorted by position.
    String
    getOriginalText()
    Returns the original, unmodified input text.
    long
    getProcessingTimeMs()
    Returns the wall-clock processing time in milliseconds.
    String
    getRedactedText()
    Returns the sanitised text with PII replaced by tokens.
    Map<String,String>
    getReverseMap()
    Returns an unmodifiable reverse-lookup map.
    boolean
    isClean()
    Returns true if the text was unchanged (no PII detected).
    String
    toString()
    Returns a one-line human-readable summary of the redaction pass.

  • Constructor Details

    • RedactionResult

      public RedactionResult(String originalText, String redactedText, List<PIIMatch> matches, Map<String,String> reverseMap, long processingTimeMs)
      Constructs a RedactionResult.
      Parameters:
      originalText - the raw input (never null)
      redactedText - the sanitised output (never null)
      matches - unmodifiable list of detections (never null)
      reverseMap - token → original map (never null)
      processingTimeMs - wall-clock duration in milliseconds

  • Method Details

    • getOriginalText

      public String getOriginalText()
      Returns the original, unmodified input text.

    • getRedactedText

      public String getRedactedText()
      Returns the sanitised text with PII replaced by tokens.

    • getMatches

      public List<PIIMatch> getMatches()
      Returns an unmodifiable list of all PII matches, sorted by position.

    • getReverseMap

      public Map<String,String> getReverseMap()
      Returns an unmodifiable reverse-lookup map. Keys are replacement tokens (e.g. "[EMAIL_1]"); values are the original PII strings.

    • getMatchCount

      public int getMatchCount()
      Returns the number of PII items detected.

    • getProcessingTimeMs

      public long getProcessingTimeMs()
      Returns the wall-clock processing time in milliseconds.

    • containsPII

      public boolean containsPII()
      Returns true if at least one PII item was detected.

    • isClean

      public boolean isClean()
      Returns true if the text was unchanged (no PII detected). Equivalent to !containsPII().

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a one-line human-readable summary of the redaction pass. 
      RedactionResult[matches=3, types=[EMAIL, PHONE, SSN], timeMs=2]
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
